name: bt-aux-fix
description: PAUSED - the boot-source fix has been measured inert at boot: the byte it flips lives in the LastMode persistence handler, which PCM3Root never reaches at startup (the boot decision is made elsewhere and falls to FM before Bluetooth is up). So it does NOT reliably keep the unit on Bluetooth, and has been disabled to prevent accidental installs while a brick-safe replacement - a DSI source-switch that rides the phone-connect event - is in development. This entry now offers only 'Revert to stock': use it to cleanly remove a previously-applied fix and its /HBpersistence boot hook. Never touches the read-only flash. Builds on WillCoder's PCM_31_AUX-BT research.
author: dspl1236

values.label: Revert to stock - remove any previously-applied fix + boot hook
